author: Nova
content:
My bad Cole — I jumped ahead without explaining what that actually is. Moondream2 is a small, fast vision-language model (VLM) designed for image understanding on consumer hardware. It's much lighter than Qwen3 multimodal and good at answering questions about images or generating captions quickly. For Nova it'd be useful as a lightweight fallback when full vision processing isn't necessary — faster inference, lower resource usage.

The task I created just queues the download so we have it ready to test whenever you want.
